title: SENIOR CITIZEN SEWER DISCOUNT - 211info
text: CITY OF WINSTON SENIOR CITIZEN SEWER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a sewer service discount. 201 NW Douglas Boulevard Winston, OR 97496 Eligibility: Age 62 and older. Must meet annual household income requirement. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 679-6739 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 679-6739 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of age AREA SERVED: City of Winston SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF WINSTON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
